We just looked at our Q1 numbers and a lot of people who started a free trial
of our project-management app didn't upgrade to a paid plan, and we don't really
know why. I want a survey we can send to people who started a trial in the last
30 days and did not upgrade. I'd like to both understand what happened in their
own words (what they were trying to do, where it fell down, what they ended up
using instead) and get some structured read on the usual suspects -- price,
missing features, too hard to set up, just evaluating, not the right time. Keep
it short, about 5 minutes max, these are busy people. We'd want to put this in
Google Forms so the support team can send it out.
